Prospecting Mechanism (cus, kwd, plcm, s.label: no source

Data Window.label: no window specified
Data Window.note: Default open-ended lifetime cookie cache tracking without time restrictions.

landing-page.note: Promotional landing catalog featuring discounted prices, seasonal holiday sales, and special bundles for security cameras.
The primary root storefront homepage showcasing flagship security camera models and new technology launches.
The main catalog landing page for the marketplace storefront filtering active security camera inventory.
Collection page dedicated to Power over Ethernet (PoE) wired security cameras and local recording network infrastructures.
Collection page concentrating on smart video doorbells, front-door entry security, and chime hardware accessories.
Collection page tracking standalone wire-free rechargeable battery security cameras powered via residential Wi-Fi.
Collection page filtering off-grid wire-free cellular LTE battery security cameras built for remote or rural locations.
Collection page mapping continuous plug-in powered security cameras connecting via Wi-Fi networks.
Collection page focusing on multi-camera security system kits bundled with local storage NVR servers.
Collection page centered on dual-lens wide-angle stitch technology security cameras for panoramic coverage.
Collection page highlighting next-generation smart automation base hubs coordinating multiple security cameras.
Collection page targeting ultra-bright motion-activated protective lighting security cameras for active night defense.
B2B intake lead portals for wholesale operations, distribution partners, or certified security custom installers.
Collection page tracking motorized pan-tilt-zoom smart tracking Wi-Fi cameras with auto-patrol features.
Exclusive showcase landing page for high-performance Value-Plus series security cameras targeting premium configurations.
Dedicated landing catalog mapping professional-grade heavy DIY security cameras for commercial and enterprise setups.
Custom localized campaign hubs for massive brand milestones, collaborative product rollouts, or new security camera launches.
E-commerce category section capturing next-level ultra-HD 16-megapixel panoramic sensor security cameras.
Standalone hardware landing page focusing exclusively on outdoor motion-triggered floodlight surveillance cameras.
Collection page targeting compact local network sync hosts designed to manage smaller residential security camera nodes.
Exclusive tech showcase filtering the Omvi smart security ecosystem with advanced cloud AI software integrations.
High-conversion clearance event page celebrating the annual brand anniversary milestone with major site-wide camera deals.

creative-type.note: Standard video ad creative covering product features, unboxing, security camera installations, or real defense footage clips.
Static single-image creative used for showcasing security camera industrial design or hardware crisp details.
Multi-card image carousel displaying a series of different security cameras or sequential lifestyle setups.
Multi-card video carousel ad displaying sequential hardware operations, tracking tech, or multi-scenario camera feature breakdowns.
Pure text copy variations reserved primarily for intent-driven search engine ad extensions or textual forum segments.
Short animated looping graphic highlighting quick key app interactions or security camera motion sensor triggers.
Criteo adaptive ad format that intelligently modifies layout, imagery, and copywriting variations to fit different app placement sizes.
Criteo dynamic ad format utilizing automated catalog feeds to dynamically retarget viewers based on viewed security camera SKUs.

creative-source.note: Brand Generated Content: Official high-production studio assets, product renders, and slick marketing videos showcasing security camera industrial design.
User Generated Content: Highly authentic, native-style creator videos demonstrating security camera unboxing, home installation, or real-life backyard capture footage.
Key Opinion Leader: Professional influencer collaborations and tech reviewer content lending authority and deep technical walkthroughs for the security camera.

creative-source-type.note: Non-public BGC video on official YouTube channel, pic/gif, or native video on other platforms.
Public BGC video published on the official YouTube brand channel.
Original security camera video hosted on the YouTube KOL's own channel.
Post-edited/cut-down KOL video uploaded to the official YouTube brand channel.

creative-discount.note: Full-price standard creative without any discount callouts or promotional overlays.
Dollar-off discount creative showing a specific monetary reduction (e.g., Save $50 / $30 Off).
Percentage-off discount creative showing a proportional price cut (e.g., 20% OFF / 30% OFF).
Tiered threshold discount creative incentivizing higher spend (e.g., Spend $200 Save $40).
Package deal creative offering bundled savings when purchasing cameras with accessories or NVR kits.
Buy-One-Get-One or multi-buy promo creative (e.g., Buy a camera, get a free solar panel).
Value-add promotional creative highlighting complimentary hardware, accessories, or cloud service trials.

creative-size.note: Universal asset bundle accommodating cross-platform responsive sizes and multi-ratio aspect configurations.
Horizontal widescreen aspect ratio optimized for YouTube desktop feeds, TV displays, and traditional landscape camera video previews.
Full-screen vertical mobile aspect ratio tailored for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and Meta Stories.
Square aspect ratio standard for Meta feed image carousels, Criteo dynamic feeds, and desktop shopping placements.

project.note: Always-On: Ever-green perpetual advertising campaign running continuously outside major promotional events.
New Product Launch: Go-to-market campaign introducing a newly released security camera model.
Re-launch Campaign: Strategic marketing push to reignite demand and sales momentum for mature camera models.
2026 Spring Sale: Promotional campaign targeting home renovation, garden, and outdoor security upgrade season.
2026 Summer Sale: Vacation and outdoor security campaign focusing on home protection while traveling.
2026 Fall Sale: Autumn home prep and shoulder-season promotional campaign.
2026 Winter Sale: Year-end clear-out and cold-weather outdoor monitoring campaign.
2026 Anniversary Sale: Brand anniversary celebration event featuring site-wide discount bundles.
2026 Prime Day: Mid-year marquee Amazon/DTC shopping festival promotion.
2026 Fall Prime Day: Autumn Prime Big Deals / Fall shopping event campaign.
2026 Black Friday & Cyber Monday: Q4 peak holiday shopping mega event campaign.
2026 Easter Sale: Spring holiday family and safety promo event.
2026 Father's Day Sale: Tech and smart home gift campaign targeting DIY and dad demographics.
2026 Mother's Day Sale: Smart home peace-of-mind gift campaign.
2026 Back to School: Late-summer home and dorm/rental security campaign.
